name: ⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTE
description:
⚠️ **CRITICAL:** The StelActionMgr is designed for C++ plugins and internal Stellarium code, NOT for scripts! All action registration methods (addAction) are `public` methods, NOT `slots`, and CANNOT be called directly from scripts. The `findAction` method also will not return usable objects in scripts.

This documentation is provided for reference only, primarily for developers creating C++ plugins. For scripting, use the public slots of individual modules directly (e.g., `SolarSystem.setFlagPlanets(true)`) rather than trying to create or trigger actions via StelActionMgr.

If you need to check or change a setting from a script, use `core.getSetting()` and `core.setSetting()` instead of trying to find and toggle an action.

compatibility.notes: This entire module is NOT scriptable. Use other modules' public slots instead.

name: addAction (slot/property version)
signature: StelAction* addAction(QString id, QString groupId, QString text, QObject target, const char* slot, QString shortcut, QString altShortcut, bool global)
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, NOT a slot. It is designed for C++ plugins and CANNOT be called directly from scripts.

Creates and registers a new StelAction connected to an object property or slot. The action appears in the hotkey configuration dialog and can be bound to buttons.

parameters.name: global
parameters.description: If true, action works without focus

compatibility.notes: This is a C++ method that CANNOT be called from scripts. For documentation only.

name: addAction (lambda version)
signature: StelAction* addAction(QString id, QString groupId, QString text, QObject context, std::function<void()> lambda, QString shortcut, QString altShortcut, bool global)
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, NOT a slot. It is designed for C++ plugins and CANNOT be called directly from scripts.

Creates and registers a new StelAction with a lambda function for custom behavior.

parameters.name: global
parameters.description: If true, action works without focus

compatibility.notes: Requires C++11. This method CANNOT be called from scripts.

name: findAction
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, NOT a slot. Even if called from a script, the returned `StelAction*` cannot be used to trigger or modify the action.

Finds a registered StelAction by its unique identifier.
returnDescription: Pointer to StelAction, or null if not found (unusable from scripts)

compatibility.notes: The returned pointer cannot be used in scripts. Use module slots directly instead.

name: findActionFromShortcut
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, NOT a slot, and returns an object unusable from scripts.

Finds a StelAction associated with a specific keyboard shortcut.
returnDescription: Pointer to StelAction, or null if not found (unusable from scripts)
example: // This documentation is for reference only. Not usable in scripts.

name: getGroupList
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, NOT a slot, and may not work reliably in scripts.

Returns a list of all action group identifiers.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public` method. Its reliability in scripts is not guaranteed.

example:
// May not work reliably, use with caution:
// var groups = StelActionMgr.getGroupList();

name: getActionList
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, NOT a slot, and returns objects unusable from scripts.

Returns a list of all StelActions belonging to a specific group.
returnDescription: List of StelAction pointers (unusable from scripts)
example: // For documentation only. Not usable in scripts.

name: getActionList (all)
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public` method, NOT a slot, and returns objects unusable from scripts.

Returns a list of all registered StelActions.
returnDescription: List of all StelAction pointers (unusable from scripts)
example: // For documentation only. Not usable in scripts.

name: saveShortcuts
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public slot`, but its effects may not be intended for scripts.

Saves the current keyboard shortcut assignments to the configuration file (config.ini).

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and can be called, but modifying shortcuts from scripts is not recommended.

example:
// Can be called, but modifying shortcuts from scripts is not recommended:
// StelActionMgr.saveShortcuts();

name: restoreDefaultShortcuts
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public slot`, but its effects may not be intended for scripts.

Restores all keyboard shortcuts to their default values and saves the configuration.

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and can be called, but resetting shortcuts from scripts is not recommended.

example:
// Can be called, but resetting shortcuts from scripts is not recommended:
// StelActionMgr.restoreDefaultShortcuts();

name: setAllActionsEnabled
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a `public slot`, but is intended for internal use during shortcut editing.

Enables or disables all actions globally.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: `true` to enable all actions, `false` to disable them

compatibility.notes: This is a `public slot` and can be called, but is intended for internal use.

example:
// Can be called, but not recommended:
// StelActionMgr.setAllActionsEnabled(false);

name: actionToggled
description:
⚠️ **WARNING:** This is a signal emitted by StelActionMgr when any action is toggled. Connecting to it from scripts may not work reliably.

Emitted when any action registered with this StelActionMgr is toggled.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the action that was toggled

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The new value of the action

compatibility.notes: Connecting to signals from scripts may not work reliably.
